articles.title: GLP-1 drugs may reduce the risk of cancer progressing, study suggests - NBC News
articles.description: GLP-1 drugs may be linked to a lower risk of cancer progression, according to new research that will be presented next week at the American Society of Clinical Oncology’s annual meeting.
